inline_comments.message: may be good to add policy-drools-pdp and policy-drools-pdp.onap to match the oom drools service one if you have to make any other changes per review.

is there an easy way to differentiate between dmaap and so,aai etc .. simulators in the names?   I guess just may be just creating 2 container one for dmaap and one for other simulators (aai+so+..) as I think we have 2 images.  Something to consider in the future to make it clear on the container names.
